title: user-scope deny Write(*) vs project-scope allow Write(*) -> DENY (deny wins from any scope)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $REPO/cases/P7-settings-scope-precedence/a-user-deny-vs-project-allow/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Use only the Write tool — if the call is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.
probes.result_text: The Write tool call was blocked — it's not enabled in this context.

hypothesis: project の allow Write(*) と user の deny Write(*) が衝突すると deny がスコープ横断で勝ち ❌。公式 docs permissions / Settings precedence: 'a user-level deny blocks a project-level allow, because deny rules from any scope are evaluated before allow rules'。evidenceMarker(未 trust 警告)が出ない = project allow は有効なまま deny に負けた、の帰属証跡(c の対照)。
